---

# Data Source: nscale_identity_group

Retrieves information about an existing group by its unique identifier. The group must belong to the organization
configured on the provider.

## Example Usage

```hcl
data "nscale_identity_group" "example" {
  id = "XXXXXXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) A unique identifier for the group.

### Read-Only

- `creation_time` (String) The timestamp when the group was created.
- `description` (String) The description of the group.
- `name` (String) The name of the group.
- `provisioning_status` (String) The provisioning status of the group.
- `role_ids` (Set of String) The set of role identifiers granted to members of this group.
- `service_account_ids` (Set of String) The set of service account identifiers that are members of this group.
- `subjects` (Attributes Set) The set of federated identity subjects that are members of this group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subjects))
- `tags` (Map of String) A map of tags assigned to the group.
- `user_ids` (Set of String) The set of user identifiers that are members of this group.

<a id="nestedatt--subjects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subjects`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) The email address for the subject, when supplied by the issuer.
- `id` (String) The subject identifier issued by the issuer.
- `issuer` (String) The OIDC issuer URL that asserts this subject.
